overall.description: A cinematic third-person walk through a rainy futuristic city intersection in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera follows a character crossing a busy street with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, while futuristic vehicles including a bus and sedan navigate the wet roads around a distinctive green transit hub building.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with transit station

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto the crosswalk entering the intersection
group of pedestrians with umbrellas crosses from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the crosswalk, moving with the flow of pedestrians toward the green transit building

notable_agents.action: large silver bus approaching the intersection from the right side of the frame

entered.detail: distinctive green and brown multi-level transit station with curved roof and large windows
futuristic elevated roadway ramps and supports silhouetted against the gray sky
tall modern street light with horizontal LED light bar
vertical traffic light pole with red signal illuminated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy futuristic city intersection with a prominent green transit hub ahead. The camera follows a character walking from the sidewalk into the crosswalk, joining pedestrians with umbrellas crossing the wet asphalt. A large bus approaches in the distance while street lights and elevated highway structures frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: middle of intersection with active vehicle traffic

events.description: dark sedan drives from left to right passing directly in front of the camera
large silver and blue bus moves alongside the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the intersection as vehicles pass closely by on both sides

notable_agents.action: dark futuristic sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the camera
large articulated bus moving through the intersection parallel to the camera's path

segments.scene_description: Moving through the middle of the intersection, the character navigates between vehicles as a dark sedan passes in front and a large bus moves alongside. The green transit building recedes to the left while pedestrians clear the crosswalk. Rain continues to fall on the reflective asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street departing the intersection

events.description: camera passes the bus which remains at the corner behind the character
blue delivery truck passes by on the left side moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking down the street past the intersection, moving away from the transit hub alongside traffic

notable_agents.action: blue delivery truck with corrugated cargo bed driving alongside then moving ahead

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues down the multi-lane street past the bus and alongside a blue delivery truck. The green transit hub falls behind as the view opens toward distant skyscrapers. The rain-slicked road reflects the headlights of oncoming traffic and street lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy futuristic intersection that gradually opens into a wide view of a neon-lit city street. It begins on a sidewalk where the camera follows a character stepping into a crosswalk toward a prominent green transit hub, joining a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas on the wet asphalt. As the character moves through the center of the intersection, the green building recedes to the left while a dark sedan and a large bus navigate around the pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the camera clears the crossing and continues down the multi-lane street, passing a blue delivery truck. Finally, the view expands past the receding transit hub toward distant skyscrapers, with the rain-slicked road reflecting the glow of street lights and oncoming headlights.
